title: Luffy Sets Sail with Shanks’ Promise
description: On pages 56–59, this part follows the Romance Dawn flashback and focuses on how Luffy’s pirate dream is formed through Shanks, Higuma, and the straw hat promise.
scene: Shanks leaves Luffy with the straw hat, turning their farewell into a promise about the future.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THAT'S WHAT YOU GET, YOU DARN FISH!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: First things first. I've got to get a crew!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I think about 10 men should do.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: AND I'LL NEED A PIRATE FLAG!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Look out world, here I come!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy'S TINY BOAT FLOATS ON, HIS CREW YET TO BE FOUND...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy's great voyage of Destiny has begun!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is no ordinary boy in a rowboat. This is a boy with a dream, challenging the vast, treacherous seas in a tiny dinghy, searching for extraordinary men for his PIRATE CREW!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WHO'D HAVE THOUGHT THIS VOYAGE WOULD END IN DISASTER SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO SO

summary: Shanks entrusts Luffy with the straw hat as a promise for the future. This moment turns Luffy’s dream into the core vow that will define his journey.
